title: Cybersecurity Alert System
goal: Create a dashboard that checks domains for threats using threat intelligence APIs and sends alerts to admins via SMS.

title: Travel Planner with Tourist Spots
goal: Design a travel app that books flights, suggests hotels, shows top-rated local attractions, and displays weather info.

title: Stock Analyzer + Buy/Sell Alerts
goal: Build a tool that tracks stock prices, analyzes trends using ML, and emails buy/sell signals to users.

title: Event Finder with Calendar Sync
goal: Build a service that finds local events based on interests and syncs selected ones to the user’s Google Calendar.

title: News Summarizer with SMS Briefing
goal: Create a system that fetches top news, summarizes headlines using LLM, and sends SMS digests every morning.

title: Price Tracker for eCommerce Products
goal: Build a bot that tracks product prices across multiple eCommerce platforms and sends alerts when prices drop.

title: Online Course Recommendation Assistant
goal: Create an education bot that suggests courses, checks ratings, and reminds users about enrollment via email.

title: Gym Finder with Booking
goal: Build a service that lists gyms near a user’s location, compares pricing plans, and enables mobile booking.

title: Loan Simulator with Email Report
goal: Create a tool that pulls interest rates, simulates repayment plans, and sends loan summaries to users.

title: Content Safety Filter for Web Links
goal: Design a service that checks whether a given URL is malicious or contains adult content before it opens in-browser.

title: Retail Promotions via Geo-Fencing
goal: Build a mobile app that detects when a user enters a shopping area and sends active retail coupons via push or SMS.

title: Social Media Topic Tracker
goal: Design a system that tracks trending hashtags, top influencers, and returns a daily engagement summary.

title: Delivery Status Tracker with Email Updates
goal: Create a logistics tool that fetches parcel tracking data, predicts ETA, and emails the customer when status changes.
